##NAMES=Berzeliite
##RRUFFID=R061084
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(NaCa_2_)Mg_2_(AsO_4_)_3_
##LOCALITY=Jakobsberg mine, Nordmark, Filipstad, Varmland, Sweden
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Light yellow irregular shaped crystal, associated with colorless tilasite and adelite, R060687
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R061084
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Na_0.92_Ca_0.08_)Ca_2.03_(Mg_1.91_Mn_0.11_)[(As_0.96_Si_0.03_P_0.01_)O_4_]_3_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 12.341 b: 12.341 c: 12.341 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 1879.4 crystal system: cubic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=785
